documentation.description:
This package provides the ``memcpy`` function as defined by the C standard.
``memcpy`` calls are directly generated by the compiler to perform record
or array copies when source and targets may overlap.

subprograms.name: memcpy
subprograms.code:
function memcpy
  (Dest : Address; Src : Address; N : Memory_Types.size_t) return Address

documentation.description:
Copies ``N`` storage units from area starting at ``Src`` to area
starting at ``Dest`` without any check for buffer overflow. The memory
areas must not overlap, or the result of this call is undefined.

If both ``Dest`` and ``Src`` are aligned on a word, the copy is done
word per word. The remaining bytes are copied byte per byte.
